docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED MAR-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARLEY, SARAH
